title: Odontochilus asraoa

This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that may aid in the treatment of various diseases. The bioactive constituents of Odontochilus asraoa include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
